calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Separate Trial On "Safe Harbor" Defense And To Stay Of All Other Aspects Of The Case
Off Calendar Jun-17-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT BUMBLE BEE FOODS, LLC'S MOTION FOR SEPARATE TRIAL ON "SAFE HARBOR" DEFENSE AND TO STAY OF ALL OTHER ASPECTS OF THE CASE

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The motion for a separate trial on defendant Bumble Bee Foods, LLC's "safe harbor" defense, is denied without prejudice. This court uses a master calendar system, and the law and motion department does not bifurcate cases that are sent out to other judges for trial. Defendant may seek single assignment from the presiding judge and this motion may be made to the assigned trial judge if single assignment is granted. The motion to stay all aspects of the case until trial on the "safe harbor" defense is denied; the request for stay is premised on the request for bifurcation.

Proposed order submitted for review. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)
